summary: WIN-031 c3 defense_survives=3 (at threshold). EXP-216 addresses all three defensive prongs from the c3 advocate review: (i) 'retrodiction is unfair — texts are sources of the model, not post-hoc labels' — answered by new kernel-of-truth paragraph 2 conceding the convergence exists AND framing the critique as non-discriminating-archetype (sidesteps the 'you deny convergence' escape); (ii) 'cross-cultural convergence is Jungian evidence the pole is special' — weakened by the new Zaphon–Zion analysis showing the specific motif is traceable to ANE literal cartography (Mount Zaphon north of Israel), not archetypal psychology; (iii) 'monitor.py exclusion is circular' — closed by Patch 1's accounting-is-the-point preemptive. After integration, defense_survives should drop to 1–2 (residual: a determined defender can still assert the Zaphon–Zion match is genuine derivation rather than borrowing, which is unfalsifiable by construction and does not save the scorecard-accounting critique). Recommended: downgrade on integration, then close once c4 cycle re-verifies.
